reference.title: Effects of oral clotrimazole troches on the pharmacokinetics of oral and intravenous midazolam.
reference.abstract: Oral clotrimazole troches decreased the apparent oral clearance of midazolam; no significant differences in the systemic clearance of midazolam were found.

_index.name: Shord2010
_index.title: Effects of oral clotrimazole troches on the pharmacokinetics of oral and intravenous midazolam.
